title: acranthera aurantiaca
intro: Acranthera aurantiaca, also known as the orange-flowered Acranthera, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acranthera aurantiaca include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease and cancer. Acranthera aurantiaca can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional folk medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
